---
title: "Code"
---

## Code and research tools

This page can collect code repositories, analysis scripts, pipelines, or visualization tools related to your work.

### Example sections

#### Public repositories
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/)
- Project name — short description
- Project name — short description

#### Analysis workflows
- Simulation post-processing
- Synthetic observation pipelines
- Visualization notebooks
- Structure-identification tools

#### Reproducibility
You can also use this page to share:

- notebooks
- example datasets
- parameter files
- plotting scripts
- tutorials for collaborators or students
